name: Laval Warrior
name_jp: ラヴァル・ウォリアー
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the original ATK of the destroyed monster. You must have 4 or more "Laval" monsters with different names in your Graveyard to activate and to resolve this effect.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the original ATK of the destroyed monster. You must have 4 or more "Laval" monsters with different names in your Graveyard to activate and to resolve this effect.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the original ATK of the destroyed monster. You must have 4 or more "Laval" monsters with different names in your Graveyard to activate and to resolve this effect.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal Chronicle 3 - Chapter of Destruction

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
